mapper.sql: cpsId, coachId, storeId, storeName, grade, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into coach_place_ship (cpsId, coachId, storeId, storeName, createdDate) values (#{cpsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into coach_place_ship
cpsId,
coachId,
storeId,
storeName,
createdDate,
#{cpsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach_place_ship
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where cpsId = #{cpsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT cps.cpsId, cps.coachId, cps.storeId,sa.storeAddrId, s.storeName, cps.grade, cps.createdDate FROM coach_place_ship cps INNER JOIN store s ON s.storeId = cps.storeId INNER JOIN store_address sa ON sa.storeId = s.storeId WHERE cps.coachId = #{coachId} AND cps.grade = 1 AND s.status=1
